name: resident_mm_elw_perf
title: Resident Mm Elw
desc: RESIDENT matmul + eltwise-binary MODE-SWITCH proof: E=(A@B)*D in one ring (stage1 MVMUL, stage2 FPU ELWMUL consuming stage1 from L1). The new mechanism the fused resident BACKWARD needs. Bit-exact 3/3 on silicon. Build overrides ELTWISE_BINARY_OP=ELWMUL, HiFi4.

telemetry.note: elapsed cycles + event counts per zone; published to the L1 perf region at 0x169000. Decode pending — runner currently peeks the base word only.

note: bhtop resident canon; see RESIDENT_GRID.md. unpack/math reconfigure per stage (matmul vs eltwise init).
